commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `--fix-missing` to the doctor missing-transcript dry-run preview hint and updates the focused state-integrity test expectation.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main doctor emits the preview without `--fix-missing`, while cleanup preview counts missing transcript entries only when `fixMissing` is true. I did not run the CLI because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker is contributor-provided real behavior proof, not an automatable code repair.

target.title: fix(doctor): preview missing transcript cleanup
target.body:
## Summary
- include --fix-missing in the doctor dry-run preview for missing transcript cleanup
- tighten state-integrity coverage for the suggested preview command

Fixes #54877

## Real behavior proof
After the fix, the doctor output previews the same missing-transcript cleanup path that the enforce command uses, including `--fix-missing`. Local terminal output from the focused state-integrity check:

```text
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor-state-integrity.test.ts
✓ src/commands/doctor-state-integrity.test.ts
30 passed
```

## Testing
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor-state-integrity.test.ts
- git diff --check
target.author: yuanhanzhong
